examples.text: لَقَدْ كَانَ فِي قَصَصِهِمْ عِبْرَةٌ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ
examples.english: There is a lesson in the stories of such people for those who understand.

senses.gloss: a tear before it overflows, a sobbing, the first sign of weeping

examples.text: فَفَاضَت دُمُوعُ الْجَحْمَتَيْنِ بِعَبْرَةٍ … عَلَى الزُبِّ حَتَّى الزُبِّ فِي المَاءِ غَامِس
examples.english: And the tears of the two eyes overflowed without sobbing … over the beard, until the beard was dipping into water

examples.text: أسندتْ رأسها إلى صدري وسالت عبراتها.
examples.english: She leant her head on my chest where slight tears flew.

etymology.text: From the root ع ب ر (ʕ b r). Compare to عَبْر (ʕabr, “crossing”).
